'''Dojundo the Hutt''' was an emissary from the [[Hutt Empire]]. He was the first [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] to find [[Vodran/Legends|Vodran]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Si'Klaata Cluster/Legends|Si'Klaata Cluster]], and wanted to recruit the native [[Vodran (species)/Legends|Vodrans]] for the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]' [[Xim Wars|war]] with [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]].

{{Char-stub}}
